title: Project REDACTED
description: A horror mod that terrorizes the player mentally and physically (in game)
body:
# PLEASE READ THE DESCRIPTION

## **Project REDACTED**

![very spooky figure in a cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cabeacbd4b01c7f53afe4334742ad9fff18af7b8_0.webp)

> **EPILEPSY WARNING:** This mod uses flashing images and sudden visual shifts. Proceed with caution.

# Overview  
Project REDACTED is a carefully crafted Minecraft horror mod that focuses on atmosphere, tension, and psychological scares. Every feature is thoughtfully researched and designed to create a unique, immersive experience without unnecessary extras. For best results, play in singleplayer and keep your mod list simple. If you have questions or feedback, the community is always open to help.

# Key Features  
- **4 Entities**  
- **7 Visual Effects**.  
- **4 Sounds**  

# Installation & Compatibility  
1. Install **Minecraft Forge** for 1.20.1.  
2. Drop the mod’s JAR into your `mods/` folder. 
3. Launch the game.

> **Note:** This mod is designed for **single‑player**. Multiplayer may work, but unexpected issues can arise.

# Frequently Asked Questions  

**Q: Will this mod break my world?**  
**A:** Possibly. Make a backup before playing.

**Q: Can I disable the visual distortions?**  
**A:** No. The visuals are integral to the experience.

**Q: When will you support Fabric or other versions?**  
**A:** Not in this release. Ports to Fabric or 1.19.2 are on the roadmap, but unconfirmed.

**Q: Is this just a copy of TBS ARG?**  
**A:** _No._ While it shares the same ARG style, Project REDACTED is built from the ground up with original assets.

# Bug Reports & Community  
This mod is still in active development and may be unstable. If you encounter any issues, please let us know on Discord:

[![Join Our Discord](https://shields.io/badge/Join%20our%20Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/b7JFs78abx)

I’d **_greatly appreciate_** any videos made with my mod—every view helps the project grow.

> _Project REDACTED uses character skins sourced from NameMC._
